channel.title: Export Jobs on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Export Jobs on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Export historical data from Log Analytics workspace with Export jobs
item.description:
Azure Log Analytics now has a public preview Export job feature for exporting historical workspace data to an Azure Storage account. Exports are driven by a query and time range so you can retrieve only the needed data for external use.

  • Source: Azure Updates
